violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving where the pizza boxes are stored needs to be clean more thoroughly.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. No self closing device for the bathroom door.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Chemical spray bottle under the front counter was not labeled.

Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied according to manufacturer's label. The sanitizer buckets concentration was too low and the sanitizer spray bottles concentration was too high.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Tray in the walk-in cooler containing food had water running from the compressor into the tray and was pooling water.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving below pizza cutting table has a build up of debris and needs to be cleaned.

Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. Pipe connected to the compressor was draining into a bucket on the floor in the walk-in cooler, not plumbed correctly.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. Self closing mechanism was not working properly and would not shut on its own.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Secondary container of poisonous or toxic material was not clearly identified to indicated contents. Chemical spray bottle located in the dish area was not labeled.
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
